title: Configure and verify Layer 2 discovery protocols

questions.question: Which protocol is an IEEE standard that collects information from neighboring devices on their identity and capabilities?
questions.explanation: LLDP is IEEE 802.1AB and provides standards-based neighbor discovery.

correct.explanation: LLDP is IEEE 802.1AB and provides standards-based neighbor discovery.

incorrect.explanation: "CDP" is incorrect because the scenario requires: LLDP is IEEE 802.1AB and provides standards-based neighbor discovery.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Picking a familiar term without matching the exact behavior tested

incorrect.explanation: "802.1b" is incorrect because the scenario requires: LLDP is IEEE 802.1AB and provides standards-based neighbor discovery.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Picking a familiar term without matching the exact behavior tested

incorrect.explanation: "802.1a" is incorrect because the scenario requires: LLDP is IEEE 802.1AB and provides standards-based neighbor discovery.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Picking a familiar term without matching the exact behavior tested

answerReview.examTip: Eliminate answers that describe a different protocol, port, or command than the stem asks for.
